-- Name: users_role; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: postgres
--

CREATE TABLE public.users_role (
    id integer NOT NULL,
    nom character varying(50) NOT NULL
);


ALTER TABLE public.users_role OWNER TO postgres;

--
-- Name: users_role_id_seq; Type: SEQUENCE; Schema: public; Owner: postgres
--

ALTER TABLE public.users_role ALTER COLUMN id ADD GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY (
    SEQUENCE NAME public.users_role_id_seq
    START WITH 1
    INCREMENT BY 1
    NO MINVALUE
    NO MAXVALUE
    CACHE 1
);


--
-- Name: users_utilisateur; Type: TABLE; Schema: public; Owner: postgres
--

CREATE TABLE public.users_utilisateur (
    id integer NOT NULL,
    password character varying(128) NOT NULL,
    last_login timestamp with time zone,
    is_superuser boolean NOT NULL,
    email character varying(254) NOT NULL,
    nom character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    prenom character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    telephone character varying(20) NOT NULL,
    is_active boolean NOT NULL,
    is_staff boolean NOT NULL,
    date_creation timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    role_id integer
);


ALTER TABLE public.users_utilisateur OWNER TO postgres;
